name: 11L Partial RoPE + LN Scale + EMA + Late QAT + XSA4 + Reptile Meta-TTT
blurb: 11 layers with PR #315 base (Partial RoPE 16/64 dims, LN Scale 1/√(layer+1), Late QAT, XSA4, EMA decay=0.997) + Reptile meta-learning (last 20% training). Phase 1: normal training with int6 quantization. Phase 2: meta-learns adaptation on MLP layers (868 meta-steps). Targets 1.114-1.120 BPB.
author: alia-abbas
